<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>Huh? What are you doing in a place

rows.JPja:

rows.CNzh:

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>這樣啊，<unk[5:0]>我還以為你是同伴，真可惜……<unk[5:1]>

就表示……<unk[5:0]>你也不討厭井吧？

<Ruby={2:4}きら>嫌いじゃないよね？ <unk[5:0]><Ruby={4:4}いど>井戸
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>Really? I hoped you'd have a deep love
of wells, like I do.<unk[5:1]> Nice to meet you
anyway. My name's Fera.
<unk[3:0:1]>Still, you are here. That must mean you
don't mind them. Wells, that is.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>井是个好地方吧。

<unk[3:0:0]>潮湿的氛围，<unk[5:0]>独特的生态系统……<unk[5:0]>
外面再热，井里却凉爽又舒适。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>井真的很棒！

<unk[3:0:0]>潮濕的氛圍、<unk[5:0]>獨有的生態系……<unk[5:0]>
而且即使外面很熱，裡頭也依然涼爽舒適。

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]><Ruby={4:4}いど>井戸ってステキよね

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>Wells are endlessly fascinating.


<unk[3:0:0]>Their damp environment...<unk[5:0]>their unique
systems of life...<unk[5:0]>how they stay cool when
it's hot outside.

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>My dream is to travel around to every
single well throughout Hyrule.

<unk[3:0:263]>After scouring all the ancient text I could
find on the subject, I've learned that
there are <Color=red><unk[2:14:40 87 101 108 108 68 105 115 99 111 118 101 114 78 117 109 84 111 116 97 108 65535 52480]> wells<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 49]>Sadly, I haven't been able to identify
their exact locations.

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>With that, you've told me the locations

love for wells was really brimming over.
Take it, as a gift from me.

我要踏上周游世界列井的旅程！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>真的很謝謝你！<unk[5:0]>

這下子我的夢想終於能夠實現了！<unk[5:1]>
我要去環遊世界上的水井！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]><Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当にありがと！<unk[5:0]>

これでワタシの<Ruby={2:4}ゆめ>夢 <Ruby={2:4}かな>叶えられそう<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={10:14}せかいいどめぐ>世界井戸巡りの<Ruby={2:4}たび>旅に <Ruby={2:2}で>出るんだ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>Truly, thank you.<unk[5:0]>


Now my dream of seeing all these wells
feels so much closer to reality. I hope
to set off on a journey to visit them all!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>说到井，<Color=red>城镇和驿站<Color=white>自不必多说，

<unk[3:0:0]><Color=red>废墟<Color=white>中也会遗留有
过去曾经使用过的井。
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>一边寄思于遥远的过去一边巡游古井，
也是别有风味的哦。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red>城鎮或驛站<Color=white>當然會有水井……

<unk[3:0:0]>另外，<Color=red>廢墟<Color=white>裡也會遺留
過去曾使用過的水井。
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>沉浸在久遠的回憶之中尋訪古井，
也別有一番風情呢。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={4:4}いど>井戸は <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}まち>町や<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿<Color=white>にはもちろん

<unk[3:0:0]><Color=red><Ruby={4:8}はいきょ>廃墟<Color=white>に <Ruby={4:10}むかしつか>昔使われていたものが
<Ruby={2:4}のこ>残ってたりもするの
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:4}とお>遠い<Ruby={2:6}むかし>昔に<Ruby={2:4}おも>思いを<Ruby={2:2}は>馳せて
<Ruby={6:8}ふるいど>古井戸を<Ruby={2:4}めぐ>巡るのも <Ruby={2:4}おつ>乙なものよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>You can find wells all over the place in
<Color=red>towns and stables<Color=white>, of course.

<unk[3:0:0]>But even more wells, those used in the
distant past, exist within <Color=red>ruins<Color=white>.<Color=red><Color=white>

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>Just imagine! They were a crucial part of
life all that time ago. Isn't that simply
fascinating?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>寻找隐藏的古井很累人吧？

<unk[3:0:268]>如果有什么<Color=red>用来找东西的道具<Color=white>，
该多方便啊……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>要尋找隱藏起來的古井很費勁吧？

<unk[3:0:268]>如果有某種<Color=red>能尋找目標物的道具<Color=white>
就會方便許多呢……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={2:4}かく>隠れた<Ruby={6:8}ふるいど>古井戸を<Ruby={2:4}さが>探すのって <Ruby={4:8}たいへん>大変よね

<unk[3:0:268]>なにか<Color=red> <Ruby={2:4}さが>探しものを<Ruby={2:4}さが>探す<Ruby={4:6}どうぐ>道具<Color=white>でもあったら
<Ruby={4:6}べんり>便利なんだけどな…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>It can be hard to find old, hidden wells.


<unk[3:0:268]>If only there was some sort of <Color=red>tool for
searching for things<Color=white>...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>井里的生态系统是独特的哦！<unk[5:1]>
里面存在许多<Color=red>地上没有的动植物<Color=white>，
<unk[3:0:0]>或许是因为环境昏暗吧，<unk[5:0]>有很多像光亮霍拉鱼那样
会微微发光的生物哦。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>水井內的生態系很獨特喔！<unk[5:1]>
裡頭有各種<Color=red>地上沒有的動植物<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:0]>或許是因為比較陰暗，<unk[5:0]>所以有許多像是
光亮霍拉魚之類會發出朦朧光芒的生物呢。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:4}いど>井戸って <Ruby={6:12}せいたいけい>生態系が<Ruby={4:8}どくとく>独特なのよね<unk[5:1]>
<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}ちじょう>地上にはいない<Ruby={6:14}どうしょくぶつ>動植物<Color=white>が たくさんいて
<unk[3:0:0]><Ruby={4:8}うすぐら>薄暗いからかな<unk[5:0]> アカリホラウオみたいに
ぼんやり<Ruby={2:4}ひか>光っている<Ruby={2:2}い>生き<Ruby={2:4}もの>物が <Ruby={2:4}おお>多いのよね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>Wells hold systems of life that are quite
special, full of <Color=red>plants and creatures
not seen aboveground<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:0]>Caves are dimly lit. Maybe that's why.<unk[5:0]>
Lots of creatures in them have their own
illumination, like the glowing cave fish.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>井里面很舒适吧。<unk[5:1]>
<Color=red>外面再热，里面也很凉爽<Color=white>，很舒服呢。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>水井裡頭很舒適呢。<unk[5:1]>
<Color=red>外面再熱，裡頭都很涼爽<Color=white>，真舒服～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:4}いど>井戸の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中って <Ruby={4:8}かいてき>快適よね<unk[5:1]>
<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}そと>外が<Ruby={2:4}あつ>暑くてもヒンヤリ<Color=white>してて <Ruby={4:4}きも>気持ちいいし
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>In their own unique way, wells are very
pleasant. They're nice and <Color=red>cool even if
it's hot outside<Color=white>.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>虽然很少见，
但在井里面有机会遇到<Color=red>妖精<Color=white>哦。
<unk[3:0:0]>虽然它们在空中飘来飘去，很难抓住，<unk[5:0]>
但只要悄悄地靠近就能抓住了。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>在水井裡面偶～爾
能夠看見<Color=red>妖精<Color=white>喔。
<unk[3:0:0]>雖然妖精輕飄飄地很難抓到，<unk[5:0]>
但只要悄～悄地靠近，其實是有機會的喔。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:4}いど>井戸の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中で たまーにだけど
<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}ようせい>妖精<Color=white>を <Ruby={2:2}み>見かけることがあるの
<unk[3:0:0]>フワフワしてて <Ruby={2:4}つか>捕まえるの<Ruby={2:6}むずか>難しいけど<unk[5:0]>
そ～っと<Ruby={2:4}ちか>近づくと <Ruby={4:8}けっこう>結構いけるよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>Though rare, <Color=red>Fairy<Color=white> sightings are possible
inside wells.

<unk[3:0:0]>They're floaty and tough to catch, but
you can manage pretty well if you
approach them niiice and sneaky.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>井的里面
有时会有<Color=red>矿床<Color=white>暴露在外，对吧？
<unk[3:0:1]>我总是在想，<unk[5:1]>
砸开矿岩、取出宝石，或许就能成为有钱人吧！
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:8 83 105 103 104]>但是太硬了，我是办不到的……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>水井裡面不是也會有
<Color=red>礦床<Color=white>裸露出來嗎？
<unk[3:0:1]>我一直在想啊～<unk[5:1]>
敲開之後就能取出寶石變成有錢人吧？
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:8 83 105 103 104]>不過那實在太硬了，我沒有辦法敲開……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={4:4}いど>井戸の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中って
<Color=red><Ruby={4:10}こうしょう>鉱床<Color=white>が<Ruby={4:8}ろしゅつ>露出していることが あるじゃない
<unk[3:0:1]>いつも<Ruby={2:4}おも>思うのよね<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:4}こわ>壊したら <Ruby={6:10}ほうせきと>宝石取ってお<Ruby={4:6}かねも>金持ちになれるかもって
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:8 83 105 103 104]><Ruby={2:4}かた>硬くて ワタシには<Ruby={4:4}むり>無理だけど…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Sometimes <Color=red>ore deposits<Color=white> are exposed
inside wells, you know.

<unk[3:0:1]>It always makes me think that if I just
shattered them somehow, I'd find gems
and strike it rich!
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:8 83 105 103 104]>But I haven't managed to do that—just
too hard for me to break.

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>I can't wait! Now, which well should I
visit first...
